documentExtends.description: Extends the Acme Core Design System with product-specific components, themes, and patterns used by the Acme Cloud Console.

description.value: Adds the **enterprise** variant for Acme Cloud Console workflows and tightens the minimum touch target for compliance with our internal accessibility audit.

modifications.description: New `enterprise` variant with a heavier visual weight, used inside the Cloud Console primary surface.
Default size is `medium` (was `small` in the base entity). The `small` size remains available.
Minimum touch target raised to 44px in all viewports (base requires 44px on mobile only).
The `ghost` variant from the base entity is not exposed in this system. Use `tertiary` instead.
Anatomy is inherited unchanged from the base Button.
